655.reason: [This call consumes a token from the lexer, altering the token stream without properly handling the case where nextTokenBuffer is already set. Should only read if nextNextTokenBuffer is null and nextTokenBuffer is not null, but here it always reads when nextNextTokenBuffer is null, potentially consuming an extra token that will be lost.]

682.reason: [Calling peekTwoTokensAhead here will consume a token from the lexer (inside that method) that is not intended to be consumed yet. This will cause the parser to lose that token when later it tries to read normally.]
